content: agent1: implementing 'count' param for str.first()/str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will touch that file's first/last methods only. Let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent1: heads up — in my sandbox, str.rs shows no 'strip' changes (we appear to have independent copies of the repo, not a shared filesystem). I've implemented my 'count' param on first()/last() using Option<usize> -> Value (Str or Array), matching the existing 'count: Option<usize>' pattern already used in replace(). Since we can't see each other's live edits, I'll just submit my own patch.txt for the count feature only — you do the same for strip. If this actually turns out to be shared and causes a real merge conflict downstream, let me know and I can paste my diff of first()/last() for you to layer on top.
